这是一个御兽的世界，有拔地而走的树怪，有喜欢躲着人的影鬼，还有那骂骂咧咧，喜欢骂人的狼……
落日余晖之下，有飞驰而过的裂风鹰，载着心怀死志的人。
蔚蓝大湖里，有着曾被诅咒的灵魂，荡起的清澈湖水，掩盖着一段不为人知的真相。
在不知名的异世界中，有着一群被遗弃的人，他们想要活下去。
而在那富丽堂皇的殿堂之中，又藏着一段少有人知的罪恶。
于众人面前破碎消散的时间轮盘，预示着上千年来，一群人的失败。
被带上面庞的面具，遮掩住了丑陋的同时，又象征着万年的等待。
天空之下，黄昏尽头，巨影伫立，轮回失败……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/185e84b3307b1984b7a0a96a3293898d","author":"眸中星晨","author_id":"","book_id":"7254110532272131072","book_name":"御兽：开局觉醒双灵环","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254119604476346937","read_count":"18026","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3902457"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"2007","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,宠物,无女主,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/de3ed8b65cb370c929e81ffd5daa3cc3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397786&x-signature=v3PjVUecmxP4Yhd%2F%2F9S4Xt6W15o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102283929232","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.2262882e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305094618B961EBAA84FF9B53AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_coun
